content.query:
select count(1) from [EDW].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] (nolock)
select distinct * from [ods].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
where associate_id='LWFECHMSS'

select count(1),ref_file from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
group by ref_file
--
--select * into EDW.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_bkup_20241222
--from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD

select ASSOCIATE_ID,PAY_DATE,count(*),REF_FILE from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
group by ASSOCIATE_ID,PAY_DATE,REF_FILE
having count(*)>1




select ASSOCIATE_ID,PAY_DATE,count(*) from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
group by ASSOCIATE_ID,PAY_DATE
having count(*)>1



select associate_id,pay_Date from ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
where associate_id='PQ8NNARPM'
--and pay_date=''

---truncate table edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD


select associate_id,pay_Date,insertedDate from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
where associate_id='0EUAYO8IG'

--truncate table  edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD


select * from edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
where associate_id='9WRHZVT9K'
order by pay_Date








UPDATE edw.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
SET associate_id = TRIM(UPPER(associate_id));


select distinct inserteddate from ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
